commands.summary: [AC-1] Verified the local NDK r26d archive SHA-1 as C7EA35FFE916082876611DA1A6D5618D15430C29 before extraction.
[AC-1] Installed the NDK from the verified local archive; source.properties reports Pkg.Revision 26.3.11579264 and Pkg.ReleaseName r26d.

commands.command: rustup target add aarch64-linux-android armv7-linux-androideabi i686-linux-android x86_64-linux-android
commands.summary: [AC-1] Confirmed all Rust Android targets required by the Tauri universal Android build path are installed.
[AC-1] Generated the Tauri Android project under src-tauri/gen/android.
[AC-8] Produced an unsigned universal release APK at src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release-unsigned.apk.

commands.command: npm run tauri -- android build --apk --target x86_64
commands.summary: [AC-8] Produced an emulator-targeted x86_64 release APK; unsigned APK SHA-256 C86E2380DB4AE27E0B6997A10DFC1B54F1A229AA85B616A8B493341A5C927328.
[AC-8] Signed the x86_64 APK with the local Android debug key for emulator proof; signed APK SHA-256 DC10BD9A7637E2233721AD53CD7C6FF52DD8FF92FB134E2A73BC5B84E8F74C77.
[AC-3] Installed the signed APK on emulator-5554.

commands.command: adb shell svc wifi disable; adb shell svc data disable; adb shell monkey -p com.apexlearning.aplusacademy -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
commands.summary: [AC-3][AC-4] Launched the installed Android app with network disabled; ActivityTaskManager displayed com.apexlearning.aplusacademy/.MainActivity.
[AC-4] Captured offline A+ dashboard content after the mobile startup fallback cleared the splash; screenshot shows A+ recommendation content.

commands.command: manual Android track switcher smoke via adb input taps
commands.summary: [AC-4] Captured offline track switcher and dashboard screenshots for A+, Network+, and Security+ content loading.

commands.command: adb shell am force-stop com.apexlearning.aplusacademy; relaunch; screenshot
commands.summary: [AC-5] Verified active track selection persisted across app relaunch: Security+ remained selected after force-stop and relaunch.
[AC-4][AC-8] Content validation passed for 3 certifications, 19 domains, 770 questions, 135 flashcards, 28 PBQs, and 150 lessons.
[AC-6][AC-8] Accessibility validation passed with 18 checks.
[AC-8] Unit tests passed: 68 tests across 3 files.
[AC-8] TypeScript and Vite production build passed.
[AC-8] Rust formatting check passed.
[AC-8] Rust backend check passed.

[AC-8] Debug Android build failed on the host Windows linker while compiling the Rust displaydoc proc-macro DLL: link.exe returned an unexpected error and Rust suggested repairing Visual Studio C++ build tools or a missing C++ workload component. Release Android builds still succeeded.

commands.command: cargo clean --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml; npm run tauri -- android build --debug --apk --target x86_64
commands.summary: [AC-8] Cleared stale Rust/Tauri build output and produced src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/debug/app-universal-debug.apk; the prior host link.exe debug blocker did not recur.

commands.command: adb install -r src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/debug/app-universal-debug.apk; adb shell pm clear com.apexlearning.aplusacademy; offline launch; 20 second wait before screenshot
commands.summary: [AC-3][AC-5] Installed debuggable APK, launched on emulator-5554 with network disabled, and used run-as access for sandbox state proof.

commands.command: Android WebView/ADB learner-state proof: practice session, bookmark, note, flashcard rating, settings, force-stop/relaunch
commands.summary: [AC-5] Verified learner-state persistence for answered/progress/attempts, bookmarks, notes, cardRatings, dailyGoal/theme, and relaunch survival in learner-state.json.

commands.command: Android encrypted export: SkillForgeAndroid.shareBackup bridge; Export encrypted button
commands.summary: [AC-7] Wrote cache/backups/skillforge-progress-2026-07-02.apexbackup and invoked Android share resolver. The stock emulator image had no share targets and displayed No apps can perform this action.
[AC-7] Imported encrypted .apexbackup through Android DocumentsUI after adding application/octet-stream to the file input accept list; Security+ fixture persisted after force-stop/relaunch.

environment.network_state: wifi and data disabled during runtime content proof
residual_limits: The proof emulator image has no Android share targets, so export resolver opened but reported No apps can perform this action; the encrypted .apexbackup file was still written and handed to Android.
